title: Trump Iran War First Primetime Address: 2-3 More Weeks
snippet: Trump gave his first primetime address on the war saying it's nearing completion and they'll hit Iran extremely hard for 2-3 more weeks. Oil immediately spiked 4%, Asian markets crashed, stock futures.

title: Trump Continue Striking Iran: S&P500 Biggest Single Day Drop Since January
snippet: 特朗普称美国将继续打击伊朗，油价大幅上涨，标普500指数应声下跌，创下自1月份以来最大单日跌幅。

title: Dow Futures Down 250pts, S&P500 Futures Down 0.6%, WTI Oil Up 3%
snippet: 周日晚间，道琼斯指数期货下跌超过250点。标普500指数期货和纳斯达克100指数期货也下跌约0.6%。西得克萨斯州中质油价格飙升近3%。

title: Trump on Iran War: Oil prices would go up much higher, stock market lower
snippet: President Trump on the Iran War: I thought that energy prices, oil prices would go up much higher. I thought the stock market would go somewhat lower. But it didn't matter to me.

title: Selloff Coming But Buying This - IREN and NBIS
snippet: Stocks are in a weird spot with Iran and the War due to Oil prices. However, you have to be ready to buy when weakness ramps up. $NBIS has been my top Play but $IREN is CHEAP right now.
